name: project-helix-sat
description: Foundation workspace for Project Helix SAT

scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path services/api-rust/Cargo.toml --check && cargo test --manifest-path services/api-rust/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:web-react: npm run lint --workspace apps/web-react && npm run build --workspace apps/web-react && node --test tests/web-react-api-client.test.mjs tests/api-contract-drift.test.mjs tests/web-react-exam-timing.test.mjs tests/web-react-session-review.test.mjs tests/web-react-attempt.test.mjs
scripts.check:ci-local: npm run check && npm run check:contracts && npm run check:web-react && npm run smoke:learner && npm run smoke:learner:react
scripts.check: node scripts/validate-foundation.mjs && npm run verify && node --test && npm run check:rust
